weather.headline: Showers And Thunderstorms
weather.detail: A chance of rain showers before noon, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 45. North wind 3 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
